### Summary

Describe the changes and their purpose.

### Architecture Checklist (if applicable)

- [ ] Layering respected: routes → services → repositories → infrastructure
- [ ] Business logic lives in services, not routes
- [ ] No upward imports
- [ ] Shared constants centralized if reused ≥ 2 places

### Testing

- [ ] Unit tests updated/added
- [ ] (Optional) Integration test coverage

### Risks / Rollback Plan

Call out any risks and how to roll back if needed.
